name: ui-studio
description: ui-studio backend in node.js and express.js
author: Hibbanur-Rahman

scripts.build: npm run build:ts && npm run copy-html
scripts.copy-assets: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'); const src='src/public',dest='dist/public'; if(!fs.existsSync(dest)) fs.mkdirSync(dest,{recursive:true}); if(fs.existsSync(src)) { const copy=s=>{ const stat=fs.statSync(s); if(stat.isDirectory()) { const destDir=s.replace(src,dest); if(!fs.existsSync(destDir)) fs.mkdirSync(destDir,{recursive:true}); fs.readdirSync(s).forEach(f=>copy(path.join(s,f))); } else fs.copyFileSync(s,s.replace(src,dest)); }; copy(src); } console.log('Assets copied successfully');"
scripts.copy-html: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'); function copyHtmlFiles(src,dest,currentPath='') { const srcPath=path.join(src,currentPath); const destPath=path.join(dest,currentPath); if(!fs.existsSync(srcPath)) return; const items=fs.readdirSync(srcPath); items.forEach(item=>{ const srcItem=path.join(srcPath,item); const destItem=path.join(destPath,item); const stat=fs.statSync(srcItem); if(stat.isDirectory()) { if(!fs.existsSync(destItem)) fs.mkdirSync(destItem,{recursive:true}); copyHtmlFiles(src,dest,path.join(currentPath,item)); } else if(path.extname(item)==='.html') { if(!fs.existsSync(destPath)) fs.mkdirSync(destPath,{recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync(srcItem,destItem); console.log(`Copied: ${path.join(currentPath,item)}`); } }); } copyHtmlFiles('src','dist'); console.log('HTML files copied successfully');"
